parameters: (\>\c[3]Jane:\c[23]\< He's probably in the room right now. I should
I have no business in the upper floor.
I have no business in the upper floor.
(\>\c[3]Jane:\c[23]\< Looks like he didn’t recognise me.\c[0])

\>\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]\<
Wait a minute! I remember you now!

\>\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]\<
You’re the girl I fired for stealing from me!

\>\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]\<
So, what are you doing here?

\>\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]\<
I don’t think someone like you can afford a room here.

\>\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]\<
You are not following me, are you?
(\>\c[3]Jane:\c[23]\< Shit! He’s onto me! I need to be very careful here...\c[0])

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
No, of course not. Why would I follow you?

\>\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]\<
So you’re saying you’re a guest here? I find that hard to believe.

\>\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]\<
No matter, I can always call the owner and verify.

\>\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]\<
The owner is a good friend of mine, by the way.
(\>\c[3]Jane:\c[23]\< Oh shoot! He’s gonna find out I’m lying!\c[0])

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Er... actually, I came here to meet with someone.

\>\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]\<
Hmm... I think I know what’s going on here.
(\>\c[3]Jane:\c[23]\< He thinks I’m a prostitute? Well, that works in my favor, so I’ll just play along.\c[0])

\>\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]\<
Heh-heh, looks like my prediction was spot on.

\>\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]\<
Didn’t I tell you that being a whore is the only job you’ll ever have?

\>\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]\<
This is what you get for messing with me and my company.
(\>\c[3]Jane:\c[23]\< Just you wait. Karma’s coming for you.\c[0])

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
If you’re done insulting me, could you please leave me alone?

\>\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]\<
Certainly. I wouldn’t wanna ruin my reputation by being seen with a whore either.
(\>\c[3]Jane:\c[23]\< Don’t worry, your reputation is gonna get ruined very soon.\c[0])

\>\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]\<
Since you are leaving, does that mean you’re done with your client?

\>\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]\<
Then how about taking up another one?

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Not enough to make me wanna fuck you.

\>\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]\<
Heh-heh, looks like that got your attention.

\>\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]\<
Money has a way of changing anyone’s mind.
(\>\c[3]Jane:\c[23]\< And more importantly, fucking him will guarantee some very incriminating video footage.\c[0])
(\>\c[3]Jane:\c[23]\< As long as I don’t mind being on the video as well.\c[0])
(\>\c[3]Jane:\c[23]\< So, do I let the man I despise most fuck me?\c[0])
(\>\c[3]Jane:\c[23]\< God! Just the thought of him laying a finger on me makes my skin crawl.\c[0])
(\>\c[3]Jane:\c[23]\< But I’m so close to getting my revenge. I can’t back down now.\c[0])
(\>\c[3]Jane:\c[23]\< I’ll do whatever it takes. Even if it means letting this prick have his way with me.\c[0])
(\c[23]Jane reluctantly accepted his proposal, the weight of her decision sinking in.\c[0])

\>\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]\<
I was going to give it to that receptionist girl when she came to my room later, but it looks like I won’t need her tonight.

\>\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]\<
Well then, come on. Follow me to my room.
(\>\c[3]Jane:\c[23]\< Even though I’m a prostitute, I’m not going to sleep with the son of a bitch that ruined my life.\c[0])
(\>\c[3]Jane:\c[23]\< Not even for all the money in the world.\c[0])

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
You think I’d sleep with the man that ruined my life?!

\>\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]\<
That’s quite the attitude you got for a whore.

\>\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]\<
And here I was, trying to help you make some cash.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
I don’t need your blood money—money built on the backs of the exploited.

\>\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]\<
Yeah, right. I’m sure all the men you fuck are saints.

\>\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]\<
Oh well, if you are not interested then no point wasting any more of my valuable time on someone like you.

\>\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]\<
Have fun whoring yourself for the rest of your life.
